mapper.sql: code, name, exchange, is_st, is_trade, `close`, prev_close, open, high, low, volume, amount, day, quancheng, turnover_rate, main_business, business_scope, business_brief, industry, industry_csrc, org_profile, pe_ttm, pb, ps_ttm, dividend_yield, high_52w, low_52w, total_mv_yi
mapper.insert: insert into base(code, name, exchange, open, high, low, `close`, prev_close, volume, amount, day, is_st, is_trade , quancheng, main_business, create_time, update_time, turnover_rate) values (#{code}, #{name}, #{exchange}, #{open}, #{high}, #{low}, #{close}, #{prevClose}, #{volume}, #{amount}, #{day}, #{isSt}, #{isTrade} , #{quancheng}, #{mainBusiness}, now(), now(), #{turnoverRate})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM base WHERE industry IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(industry) != '' AND industry != '综合'
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM base WHERE main_business IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(main_business) != ''
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM base WHERE business_brief IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(business_brief) != '' AND CHAR_LENGTH(TRIM(business_brief)) >= 12
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM base WHERE pe_ttm IS NOT NULL AND pe_ttm > 0

select
from base s where s.is_trade = 1 and ( s.code like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or s.name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') ) order by s.amount desc limit #{limit}
